cases.prompt: 이 서비스 백엔드 필요해? 프론트만으로 될까?

assertions.text: Decides frontend-only vs fullstack using the backend decision tree (shared data, auth/payment, AI, realtime).
Recommends an API style (REST/GraphQL/tRPC/gRPC/BaaS) matched to the use case.

cases.prompt: Decide the tech stack and deployment for my app at launch scale.

assertions.text: Produces a scale-matched deployment plan with platform and estimated monthly cost.
Outputs an ARCHITECTURE.md with the chosen stack and a stability roadmap to production.
